response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile software developer with strong web/full-stack credentials (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and 15+ years in the industry, but their profile does not match this role's core requirement of deep, recent C++ expertise for industrial automation. Their only professional C++ experience was a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015. There is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers at industrial scale, IEC 62443 / SDL practices, or industrial protocol experience. The systems-level DLang work shows aptitude for performant, concurrent software, but the gap between their trajectory (web platforms, GIS, AI tooling) and this JD (secure industrial C++ development) is too wide.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering career spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic, albeit in DLang
Strong craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: Minimal professional C++ experience — a single ~7-month role over a decade ago
No industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus), or IEC 62443 / SDL security background
Recent career focus (TypeScript, Node.js, AI tooling) diverges from the C++ systems trajectory this role requires
